name: vocab-master
description: 高效英语背单词桌面软件 - 采用SM-2间隔重复算法，科学记忆英语词汇

scripts.test: python -m unittest discover -s tests && node tests/core-utils.test.js && node tests/learning-intelligence.test.js && node tests/sm2-scheduler.test.js && node tests/search-utils.test.js
scripts.check: python scripts/check_python_syntax.py && node --check src/app.js && node --check src/core-utils.js && node --check src/learning-intelligence.js && node --check src/sm2-scheduler.js && node --check src/search-utils.js
